name: l2_static_airframe_rotational_damping_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRotationalDampingSweepPlan records pitch yaw and roll body-rate calibration targets before angular drag can be changed.
note: Reference surface for future rotational damping A4MC L2 evidence.

name: l2_drone_probe_geometry
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the static solid mask grid and force moment baseline geometry reused by each rotational sweep target.
note: Geometry baseline for rotational damping sweep cases.

name: l2_multi_axis_config_blend_policy
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisConfigBlendPolicy blocks angular drag blending until rotational damping evidence exists.
note: Prior review layer that requests dynamic angular-drag evidence.

name: drone_physics_airframe_angular_drag
value: DronePhysics applies angularDragCoefficient and rotational airframe damping to pitch yaw and roll body-rate torque.
note: Runtime target for future angular-drag calibration.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future rotational L2 force moment runs with moving-boundary or rotational velocity-field support.
note: Upstream live CFD target for future rotational damping evidence.

name: rotational_damping_evidence
value: Use positive and negative pitch yaw and roll body-rate cases to fit moment derivative signs and magnitudes. Static baseline geometry is ready but angular drag calibration remains closed until A4MC exposes rotational velocity-field or moving-boundary force moment runs.
note: Method documents why static moment magnitudes do not directly tune angular drag.
